title: Taco Tuesday Open Source Builder Nights

venue.name: Zelifcam
venue.address: 10200 San Pedro Ave, San Antonio, TX, 78216

description:
Join us for an open source building night. Whether you’re starting something new, contributing to an existing repo, or just exploring ideas, this is your time to build alongside others.

**We have a donation area for the San Antonio Food Bank! Don't forget to bring non-perishable items to help out.**

This session is all about collaboration, progress, and shared problem-solving. Come with a project in mind or jump in with someone else’s.

What to expect:

* Quick kickoff and space to share what you’re working on
* Demos or updates for those who want to show progress
* Open working time with a room full of builders
* Casual conversation, spontaneous pairing, and idea swaps
* Tacos. Because why not.

Bring your laptop, your curiosity, and your appetite.
